title: Responsive Off Canvas Menu

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Off Canvas Menu
Create a responsive off canvas menu that slides in from the left on small and medium screens. The menu should be triggered by a button and should contain links to navigation pages.

### Requirements
1. The menu should have a minimum width of 200px and a maximum width of 300px.
2. The menu should be positioned off-canvas on small and medium screens.
3. The menu should slide in and out from the left on small and medium screens.
4. The menu should be fully accessible using a screen reader.
5. The menu should work in all modern browsers.

constraints: Use only HTML and CSS for styling.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Make sure the menu is fully accessible.
